title: のちの人気投票3位キャラ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After school, I decide to kill some time in the trainer's office until my
training session with Nice Nature, but as I open the door, I see a
familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Heyo, Trainer. I was just about to knock.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Of course, star students are always punctual... Just kidding. A friend
of mine lent me this manga, so I've been flipping through it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The title's "Beyond the Turf"—you know it, Trainer? It's all the rage
with the kids lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a look at the manga on the desk. On the cover is an illustration
of an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Looks like you don't.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's no good—you gotta keep up with what the youngsters are into
nowadays... Not that I knew about it till today either.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's why my friend basically forced it on me, y'know. I can see why
it's so popular, though—it really sucks you in.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It tells the story of an Umamusume aiming to be loved by all as she
competes with rivals and friends alike.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And get this—I just got to the part where her dream of winning the
Triple Crown gets shattered. Man, that was a real nail-biter.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"As long as I keep running, my dream will never die!" When she said
that, I got the chills.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yup, yup, she's the kinda protagonist you wanna root for. It's like,
she's got that extra spark, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She's talented but also super hardworking and sticks to her beliefs.
Pretty much the perfect Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I guess that's to be expected from a fictional character.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But you know, girls like her really do exist. In fact, there's a few right
here at this academy.
choice_data_list: We can't lose to them, now can we?!
We can't lose to them, now can we?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: C-come on, don't try to pump me up like that!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If I was in this manga, I'd be the side character who's comforting the
crying protagonist.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: She even talks like I do. Like here...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: "No matter how hard you try, there are hurdles you just can't overcome." That's so me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Makes me wanna go tell her, "Stop being a wet blanket and suck it
up." Haha, you know that feeling of disliking someone too similar to
you?

text_block_list.name: Nature's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, is Natie—ah, there you are. I finished the latest volume of
"Beyond the Turf," so I brought it over for you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I was just telling Trainer about this manga. You know that side
character who's always hanging around the main character?

text_block_list.name: Nature's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Oh, she really pops off in the newest volume! Every one of her lines
really resonated with me!

text_block_list.name: Nature's Friend
text_block_list.text:
"I'm not a prodigy... But I want to keep trying, keep winning, and see
my happily ever after!" Like, sooo amazing!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, spoilers! For real, though? She said all that? Huh? As a side
character?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: N-no no no no! You think I'd ever talk about my "happily ever after"?

text_block_list.name: Nature's Friend
text_block_list.text:
You know, Natie, recently you seem more serious, or like—I can feel
your passion from the way you run.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Not you too?! No way, no way, no way! Not a chance!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, look at the time—we gotta start training! To the track we go!
choice_data_list: Let's see your happily ever after!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: C'mooon! I told you already, I'd never say something like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nature and I head for the track, where another fruitful day of training
awaits.
